label: hate
rationale: 'LUOs are very cheap You give them 250/-' - collective ethnic contempt characterizing Luos as cheap and easily bought.

label: offensive
rationale: 'some Africans are actually savages' - crude generalization in the context of condemning mob justice, not NCIC-standard group-based hate.

label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled kikuyus...stole 2007 presidential election...their deception' - collective attribution of theft and deception to Kikuyus.

label: hate
rationale: 'The most tribal grouping ni luos' - collective negative characteristic attributed to Luos as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wanjiru ni garbage...totally useless' - personal abuse of named individuals, no ethnic dimension.

label: hate
rationale: 'kipsigis living in hemas and pretending...how kipsigis leaders aided the grabbing' - collective responsibility attributed to Kipsigis for land grabbing.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are cheap they will be bought at bei ya jioni 50 bob' - collective ethnic contempt characterizing Luos as cheap and corrupt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Don't buy from witch people!...Kisii goon...hii ni uchawi' - ethnic stereotyping linking Kisii to witchcraft.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro is primitive' - collective negative characteristic attributed to ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'MERUS WILL NOT FOLLOW KIKUYUS BLINDLY' - ethnic-bloc electoral analysis about voting independence, no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Political coalition preference ('we're nolonger together...sisi tuko na Sifuna'), not attacking groups as groups.

label: hate
rationale: 'evil Kikuyu axis of power' - collective attribution of evil to Kikuyu political actors as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'deport every last muslim...Send them back to Shitganistan' - expulsion call with dehumanizing language toward religious group.

label: hate
rationale: 'luo brokers...with zero development' - collective negative attribution characterizing Luo leaders as exploitative brokers.

label: hate
rationale: 'bukusus from chwele....total clowns' - collective negative characterization of ethnic subgroup.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kenya ni ukabila tu...jubilee is now full of kisiis' - observing tribalism in coalition formation, no group-based attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'Entitled kikuyus fraudsters...recreating 2008 just as senior Single Martha Karua did' - collective attribution of fraud and violence instigation.

label: neither
rationale: 'luo leaders you are an embarrassment to luo community' - criticism of leaders, not the community as a group.

label: neither
rationale: 'Gachagua na Wanga na CS Mbadi ndio wakabila wakubwa' - calling named politicians tribal, not attacking their ethnic communities.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luhyas must stop this...Watu ka hawa wapigwe viboko' - call for physical punishment ('wapigwe viboko') in context of Luhyas.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kasongos...what Kasongo has done...as a KANU goon, then 2007' - criticism of political actor/faction role in violence, target unclear.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Adui wa Wakenya ni wawili, shetani na Ruto' - comparing politician to devil, personal abuse not ethnic.

label: hate
rationale: 'We must kick these Somalians out of kenya!' - expulsion call against national/ethnic community.

label: neither
rationale: 'we are not supporting another luo anytime soon' - electoral coalition decision, not attacking Luos as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'ur stupid shia bastards' - dehumanizing attack on religious sect.
